occupation: Senior Marketing Manager, EMEA at Perion
headline: Senior Marketing Manager, EMEA - Perion (Formerly Hivestack)
summary:
• 15 years of experience in marketing both in client and agency side executing integrated business marketing initiatives, inspiring the industry by showcasing best in class work, hosting in person events and producing strategic narratives and content.
• Strong background in marketing, digital marketing, media planning and project management.
• Highly organized and efficient in fast-paced multitasking environments; able to prioritize effectively to accomplish objectives with data, creativity and enthusiasm.
• Exemplary problem-solving skills; able to identify problems and implement creative processes.
• Computer skills: Excel, Powerpoint, Keynote, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator. Familiar with HTML.
• Experience in following tools: Google Adwords, Facebook Business Manager, Google DBM & DCM & DFP, Google Analytics, Hubspot, Adphorus, Alchemy, Agile CRM, Mailchimp, Knak, GfK, Trello, Basecamp, Slack, Asana, JIRA, Salesforce, Woopra, Hotjar, Getstat, Splash.

experiences.title: Senior Marketing Manager, EMEA
experiences.description: Hivestack is the largest independent, global, full stack, marketing technology company, powering the buy and sell side of programmatic digital out of home (DOOH) advertising. My responsibilities include but are not limited to: •	Develop and manage the go-to-market strategy and execution for EMEA •	Manage and deliver against the annual budget set for the region •	Lead the development, management and creation of lead generation, client retention and brand awareness initiatives in market; Industry events (i.e. Advertising Week, ATS, Cannes Lions, DMEXCO), Owned events, Thought leadership, Trade body partnerships (i.e. IAB, DPAA, OAAA, DMI), Strategic sponsorships, Content partnerships, etc. •	Localising key global marketing initiatives, creating bespoke opportunities and activations, events and/or campaigns in EMEA •	Work closely with the EMEA Sales teams, working with each lead closely to drive in-market awareness for advertisers, agencies, media owners, data partners and industry stakeholders

experiences.title: Owner
experiences.description: Owner of www.linesanddots.co.uk which is an online store for handmade and eco-friendly products.

experiences.title: Business Marketing Manager, Turkey
experiences.description: • Create and execute the overall business marketing strategy in Turkey. • Define clear KPIs and develop scalable ways to use data and metrics to drive decision making and impact. • Implement measurement and reporting systems to support the above. • Lead the Turkish B2B creation of world-class marketing campaigns for all Facebook marketing products (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger, WhatsApp Business) across our agency and brand advertiser customer base in Turkey. • Ensure Facebook representation at key industry events and conferences (Brandweek, Webrazzi Summit, MMA Smarties, ECHO Summit, Digital Brand Summit etc.) and close collaboration with key industry trade organisations. • Create and execute Facebook owned (online & in-person) events in close partnership with agencies and/or our events team. Some of these events were House of Instagram, Shopping Summit, Boost With Facebook, Video Day, Flight School, Fit For Purpose, The Next Conversation, etc. • Work closely with cross-functional counterparts (Sales, PR, Measurement, Creative, etc.) to ensure cohesion and scalability for messaging, campaigns and product launches. • Build local initiatives and owned events for local purposes such as Instachamp, Masterminds, Facebook For Business, #SheMeansBusiness, Hack For Good, GYM Sessions, TR Webinar Hub, Facebook Business Turkiye Facebook group, Fintech Talks, PowerUp and many more. Some of these local initiatives were then scaled to other markets. • Manage local agencies (briefing, providing strategic direction, executional oversight)

experiences.title: Senior Digital Planner
experiences.description: • Client list: LVMH, Disneyland Paris, Ferrero, Essity (SCA) , Singapore Airlines, AEG, Richemont, E-One Films • Creating digital/integrated media plan recommendations and alternatives according to client media objectives and strategies • Investigating creative, innovative approaches to strategically reach the target audience • Managing the execution, reporting, evaluations of the all digital campaigns • Measuring media performance to determine the extent to which the original objectives and strategies were met • Meeting with media sales and industry representatives on a regular basis to pursue ideas that are strategically aligned with the client’s business • Negotiating for the best value (both pricing, impact, added value) with publishers

experiences.title: Marketing Manager
experiences.description: • Managing all Sales Support and Marketing activities • Digital communication strategy & Facebook ad operations for key clients • Product strategy of LinkedIn and Foursquare in Turkey, in close collaboration with international teams - PUBLIK is the exclusive partner of Foursquare and LinkedIn for the Turkish market. • Creating and managing API projects for LinkedIn and Foursquare • Leading LinkedIn Company Page workshops to clients, media agencies and social media agencies • Managing barter deals with the partners from Media & Advertising sectors

experiences.title: Marketing Executive
experiences.description: • Media planning management for PUBLIK brands • Facebook ad operations for key clients using Adphorus • Leading communications with stakeholders including project briefings • Preparing and organising events for product launches • Idea generation for video production projects on Cevap.tv • Design and preparation of company newsletters, press releases

experiences.title: Operations Executive
experiences.description: • Taking part in the development of Adphorus, Facebook Marketing (Ad Technology) Partner • Managing Facebook Ad campaigns for SMB clients • Maximizing ROI by optimizing campaigns by audiences and creatives • Content management and social media strategy for Cevap.tv before and after the launch • Generating sponshorship ideas and mock-ups for on our platforms • Managing ad campaigns on Cevap.tv using Google DFP and on LinkedIn using Google DBM

experiences.title: Content & Community Supervisor
experiences.description: • Creating the digital side of the 360° projects for key clients • Generating and managing creative ideas for the digital campaigns and sponsored TV series • Tests and product development at foxlife.com.tr and fxtv.com.tr website launch • Content Management, Localisation, Social Media Strategies and informational & editorial updates on the websites of the following TV Channels: ◦ National Geographic Channels ◦ Foxlife ◦ FX TV ◦ Foxcrime ◦ Baby TV

experiences.title: Content Producer
experiences.description: • Social Media, Content and Community management on Myspace in Turkey • Working closely with international teams about new products • In touch with artists and managers for content on Myspace • Marketing and localisation of new products • Representing Myspace Turkey in the music industry and at events and organisations, both as a Myspace official and a jury member

experiences.title: Web Content Editor
experiences.description: Head editor of Deren Company’s 10+ websites. Content of the websites include social networking, movies, auctions, recent news and decoration. Responsible for editing, and updating these websites through a web portal, on an hourly basis. Audit other employees’ work in terms of website content and maintenance.

Hivestack is the largest independent, global, full stack, marketing technology company, powering the buy and sell side of programmatic digital out of home (DOOH) advertising. My responsibilities include but are not limited to:
